Lib/test/test_json/test_encode.py:47: in test_json_encode_float
    assert json.dumps(1.0) == '1.0'
AssertionError: assert '1' == '1.0'

This test was passing before commit a3f9b2c ("Optimize float serialization").
The encoder previously returned '1.0' for whole floats, now returns '1'.
